title: 3.27.0b Hotfix 3
changes: The Market now shows a warning if you're trying to buy an item that is the same Item Class but has a different price to the one you've travelled to purchase.
Fixed a client crash in the Hall of Grandmasters.
You will need to restart your client to receive the client changes in this patch.
